# Mikel Echeverria

Mikel Echeverria is a Backend & Full Stack Engineer based in Pamplona, Navarra, Spain.

Core work:
- Backend engineering and API architecture
- Full stack web applications
- Django, React, Astro, Spring Boot and SQL
- Automation and applied artificial intelligence

[Canonical site](https://www.mikeldev.com/)

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mikel-echeverria)
